meta.notes: Rust rewrite. Git repo required to run.
meta.tldr: This release introduces device-code ChatGPT sign-in to the app-server TUI, along with the ability to refresh existing ChatGPT tokens. Plugin setup is now smoother, with Codex prompting to install missing plugins or connectors, honoring a configured suggestion allowlist, and syncing install/uninstall state remotely. A `userpromptsubmit` hook has been added to allow prompts to be blocked or augmented before execution. Realtime sessions now start with recent thread context, reducing self-interruptions during audio playback. Several bug fixes address issues such as first-turn stalls, conversation history restoration, and Linux sandbox startup problems.

features.name: Interactive TUI
features.description: Full-screen terminal UI with conversation, approvals, transcript, and tool output panels.
key_details: @ in composer triggers fuzzy file search
Enter while Claude running: inject instructions mid-turn
Tab while running: queue follow-up for next turn
Esc Esc: edit previous user message / walk back transcript
$ mention picker: labels Skills, Apps, Plugins — plugins surface first

features.name: Non-Interactive Exec Mode
features.description: One-shot headless execution. codex exec runs without interactive TUI, outputs to stdout.
key_details: codex exec --yolo "task" — no sandbox, no approvals, live web search
codex exec resume --last "follow-up" — resume last session headlessly
codex exec resume <id> "follow-up" — resume specific session headlessly

features.name: Cloud Tasks
features.description: Run tasks in cloud environments. Best-of-N runs supported.
key_details: codex cloud exec --env ENV_ID --attempts 3 "task" — best-of-N runs

features.name: Session Resume
features.description: Resume prior sessions with transcript, plan history, and approvals preserved.
key_details: codex resume — picker of recent sessions
codex resume --all — sessions from any directory
codex resume --last — jump to most recent
Override CWD with --cd or add extra dirs with --add-dir

features.name: Multi-Agent
features.description: Codex auto-spawns sub-agents for parallel work. Manages orchestration, routing, and consolidation.

built_in_roles.purpose: Long-running command monitoring, up to 1hr wait calls

key_details: Consolidated response after all agents complete
/agent to switch between active agent threads
Interactive: approval requests surface from inactive threads (press o to open)
Non-interactive: unapproved actions fail and surface to parent

features.name: CSV Fan-Out (spawn_agents_on_csv)
features.description: Batch parallel processing. One worker per CSV row, results collected into output CSV.
key_details: Each worker calls report_agent_job_result exactly once
Output CSV includes original data + job metadata
features.example: Create /tmp/components.csv with columns path,owner. Call spawn_agents_on_csv with csv_path, instruction: 'Review {path} owned by {owner}. Return JSON.', output_csv_path: /tmp/review.csv

features.name: Custom Agent Roles
features.description: Define custom agent roles in config. Each role gets its own model, reasoning effort, sandbox policy, and developer instructions.
features.config_example:
[agents.reviewer]
description = "PR reviewer focused on correctness and security."
config_file = "agents/reviewer.toml"

features.name: Code Review
features.description: Built-in code review via /review command with preset review modes.
review_presets: Review against base branch — diff vs upstream
Review uncommitted changes — staged + unstaged + untracked
key_details: Override model with review_model in config

features.name: Web Search
features.description: Web search with cached results by default. --search flag for live results.

modes.cached: Default. OpenAI-maintained cached index (reduced prompt injection exposure).

features.name: Hooks Engine
features.description: Lifecycle hooks that fire at session start and stop events.

features.name: Code Mode
features.description: Isolated coding workflows with different execution context.

features.name: Plugin System
features.description: Curated marketplace with auth checks, rich metadata. Plugins provide tools, skills, and MCP servers.
key_details: Config switch to disable bundled system skills entirely (0.114.0)
$ mention picker labels Skills/Apps/Plugins, plugins surface first

features.name: MCP (Model Context Protocol)
features.description: STDIO and streaming HTTP MCP servers. Codex itself can run as MCP server for other agents.
key_details: Codex as MCP server: allows other agents to use Codex capabilities

features.name: TypeScript + Python SDK
features.description: Programmatic Codex control via TypeScript or Python SDKs.
features.typescript_example: const codex = new Codex(); const thread = codex.startThread(); await thread.run('Fix CI'); const thread2 = codex.resumeThread('<thread-id>');
key_details: Same thread: multiple sequential run() calls
Python SDK: generated v2 schema types added in 0.114.0
WebSocket server: GET /readyz and GET /healthz health endpoints (0.114.0)

features.name: Image Inputs
features.description: Attach images to queries. PNG and JPEG supported.
key_details: Paste images directly into interactive composer
Image generation also available (saves to CWD)

features.name: Permission Profiles
features.description: Precise filesystem and network sandbox policy configuration language. Replaces legacy permission modes.
key_details: Legacy workspace-write behavior preserved for backward compat (0.114.0 fix)
Profiles forward-compatible: newer profiles degrade safely on older builds

features.name: Feature Flags
features.description: Toggle experimental features per-profile.

features.name: SQLite Session Logging
features.description: Session transcripts stored in SQLite with configurable retention and pruning.

features.name: WebSocket Health Endpoints
features.description: WebSocket app-server deployments now expose `GET /readyz` and `GET /healthz` on the same listener for easier health checks.

features.name: Disable Bundled System Skills
features.description: Added a config switch to disable bundled system skills entirely.

features.name: Realtime Transcript Handoffs
features.description: Handoffs now carry realtime transcript context, which improves continuity when work is transferred between turns.

features.name: Improved Mention Picker
features.description: Improved the `$` mention picker by clearly labeling Skills, Apps, and Plugins, and by surfacing plugins first.

features.name: Full Resolution Image Inspection
features.description: Supported models can now request full-resolution image inspection through both `view_image` and `codex.emitImage(..., detail: "original")`, which helps with precision visual tasks.

features.name: js_repl cwd and homeDir helpers
features.description: `js_repl` now exposes `codex.cwd` and `codex.homeDir`, and saved `codex.tool(...)` / `codex.emitImage(...)` references keep working across cells.

features.name: Realtime Websocket Transcription and v2 Handoff
features.description: Realtime websocket sessions gained a dedicated transcription mode, plus v2 handoff support through the `codex` tool, with a unified `[realtime]` session config.

features.name: v2 App-Server Filesystem RPCs
features.description: The v2 app-server now exposes filesystem RPCs for file reads, writes, copies, directory operations, and path watching, and there is a new Python SDK for integrating with that API.

features.name: Smart Approvals Guardian Subagent
features.description: Smart Approvals can now route review requests through a guardian subagent in core, app-server, and TUI, reducing repeated setup work on follow-up approvals.

features.name: App Integrations Responses API
features.description: App integrations now use the Responses API tool-search flow, can suggest missing tools, and fall back cleanly when the active model does not support search-based lookup.

features.name: App-server TUI device-code ChatGPT sign-in
features.description: App-server TUI now supports device-code ChatGPT sign-in during onboarding and can refresh existing ChatGPT tokens.

features.name: Smoother Plugin Setup
features.description: Plugin setup is smoother: Codex can prompt to install missing plugins or connectors, honor a configured suggestion allowlist, and sync install/uninstall state remotely.

features.name: userpromptsubmit hook
features.description: Added a `userpromptsubmit` hook so prompts can be blocked or augmented before execution and before they enter history.

features.name: Realtime sessions thread context
features.description: Realtime sessions now start with recent thread context and are less likely to self-interrupt during audio playback.

features.name: Memory citation to agent message
features.description: Add memory citation to agent message

commands.name: /review
commands.description: Open code review preset picker. Review branch diff, uncommitted changes, specific commit, or custom instructions.

commands.name: /experimental
commands.description: Toggle experimental features including multi-agent mode.

commands.name: /agent
commands.description: Switch between active agent threads in multi-agent mode.

commands.name: /clear
commands.description: Wipe terminal and start fresh chat.

commands.name: /fork
commands.description: Fork conversation from an earlier message.

current.description: Auto-approve all actions within workspace. No permission prompts.
No sandbox, no approvals, live web search enabled.
Attach images to the initial query.
Force live web search (overrides cached default).
Specify cloud environment ID for cloud tasks.

models.note: Fast status indicator shown in TUI for gpt-5.4 only

breaking_changes.title: Permission profiles behavior change
breaking_changes.description: Permission profiles forward-compatibility: newer profiles now degrade safely on older builds. Legacy workspace-write behavior preserved. Some configs that relied on older behavior may behave differently.
breaking_changes.migration: Review permission profile configs after upgrading. Test that sandbox policy behaves as expected. Use permission-profiles forward-compat config syntax.

requirements: Git repository required (will not run outside trusted git directory)
PTY required for interactive TUI mode
